ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., pitcher, catcher) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "player_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "player_bats" TEXT /* Bats (left, right, switch) */,
  "player_throws" TEXT /* Throws (left, right) */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (active, injured, retired) */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "contract_start" TEXT /* Start date of the current contract */,
  "contract_end" TEXT /* End date of the current contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Team colors */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "team_president" TEXT /* Name of the team's president */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "regular_season_games" INTEGER /* Number of regular season games */,
  "post_season_games" INTEGER /* Number of post-season games */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the championship in this season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the analysis record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being analyzed */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season for which the analysis is conducted */,
  "analysis_result" TEXT /* Textual insight or analysis result */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was conducted */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., batting, pitching, fielding) */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis (e.g., statistical, machine learning) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_analysis_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_analysis_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach works with */,
  "coach_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "coach_position" TEXT /* Position of the coach (e.g., head coach, assistant coach) */,
  "coach_hire_date" TEXT /* Date the coach was hired */,
  "coach_contract_start" TEXT /* Start date of the coach's contract */,
  "coach_contract_end" TEXT /* End date of the coach's contract */,
  "coach_degree" TEXT /* Highest degree held by the coach */,
  "coach_experience" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the information */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistic being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the statistic was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
